overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077) on a rainy overcast day. The camera crosses a wet intersection and proceeds along a covered sidewalk lined with modern glass buildings, digital billboards, and elevated highways, encountering pedestrians with umbrellas.

beginning to cross the wet street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then walking across the wet intersection

notable_agents.action: white van driving past the crosswalk from right to left

multi-level highway structure spanning across the street above

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic urban intersection with wet roads reflecting the overcast sky. The camera waits at a crosswalk as a white van passes, then begins crossing the street. Elevated highways loom overhead while modern glass skyscrapers rise on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with slatted metal fence

events.description: moving from open intersection onto covered sidewalk under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a metal slatted fence

entered.detail: horizontal metal slat fence running along the right side of the walkway
row of trees planted along the sidewalk edge
building facade covered with large digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a covered sidewalk running parallel to the street, sheltered by the elevated highway above. A metal slatted fence runs along the right side, while futuristic vehicles pass on the left. The walkway is lined with trees and modern glass buildings featuring digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard visible through slatted fence

events.description: camera pans right to look through the slatted fence into interior plaza

agents.ego_description: slowing to peer through the metal slats at the interior courtyard

entered.detail: indoor courtyard space visible through the fence slats with modern furniture
trees growing inside the enclosed courtyard area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to focus through the horizontal slats of the fence, revealing an interior courtyard with indoor trees and modern furniture. The view shifts from the exterior street to this sheltered interior space, showing a quiet plaza area behind the fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with oncoming foot traffic

events.description: camera returns to forward-facing direction and resumes walking
pedestrians with colorful umbrellas appear walking toward camera

agents.ego_description: walking forward along the sidewalk passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with purple umbrella walking toward the camera
person with green umbrella walking past on the left

segments.scene_description: Returning to the forward view, the camera continues along the walkway and encounters pedestrians carrying colorful umbrellas walking in the opposite direction. The slatted fence continues on the right, and futuristic buildings with digital signage line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major commercial building with large digital displays

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the towering skyscraper
camera tilts back down to eye level

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the massive skyscraper with advertisements before continuing

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive towering building covered with multiple digital billboards and advertisements
large screen displaying tech advertisement on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive skyscraper towering overhead, covered in digital advertisements and signage. After admiring the building, the view returns to street level as the camera approaches a building entrance, with other pedestrians visible ahead on the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, rain-slicked urban intersection into the sheltered corridor of a futuristic city sidewalk. It begins at a crosswalk where wet roads reflect the overcast sky, pausing as a white van passes before the camera moves forward beneath looming elevated highways and towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera crosses the street, the scene shifts from the exposed roadway to a covered walkway sheltered by the highway above. The perspective then glides along this path, passing a metal slatted fence and futuristic vehicles on the left, while the environment opens up to reveal a line of trees and modern buildings adorned with glowing digital billboards.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic urban walkway that shifts from a momentary glimpse of a secluded interior to the overwhelming scale of the city's architecture. It begins by peering through the horizontal slats of a fence to reveal a quiet interior courtyard filled with indoor trees and modern furniture. As the camera returns to a forward view, it proceeds along the path, passing pedestrians with colorful umbrellas while digital signage and futuristic buildings line the left side of the walkway. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal a massive skyscraper towering overhead and draped in glowing digital advertisements before descending back to street level. Finally, the camera moves toward a building entrance, following the flow of pedestrians ahead on the rain-slicked path.
